title: Prevention services offered and referrals ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for Prevention services offered and referrals ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.B.DE150.en: Offer male and female condoms and condom-compatible lubricants

HIV.B.DE151.en: Offer pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) for people at elevated risk for HIV acquisition

HIV.B.DE152.en: Offer post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) following suspected exposure

HIV.B.DE154.en: Harm reduction for people who inject drugs

HIV.B.DE155.en: Behavioural interventions to support risk reduction, particularly for people with HIV and members of key populations

HIV.B.DE156.en: HIV testing for partners and biological children

HIV.B.DE157.en: HIV testing for partners and social contacts of people from key populations, where appropriate
